where_to_eat.name: Bangkok Sky Buffet
where_to_eat.description: Located on the 76th floor of Baiyoke Hotel, this high-altitude buffet restaurant offers panoramic views of Bangkok while dining. A great spot for both food and sightseeing combined.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Bangkok Photospot (Road Photography Location)
gram_worthy_spots.description: A scenic road photography location that requires at least a 600mm lens to capture properly, known for its weather-dependent and dramatic lighting conditions. Popular among photography enthusiasts seeking to recreate specific aerial perspectives of Bangkok.
